reviews.title: There was no option for negative review.
reviews.text: The entire property looks like a haunted house. The breakfast arena had birds inside the hall. The room looked old and unclean. Since we didn’t come back for both the nights we just used it to keep our luggage. And hence somehow we managed. The property is short on staffs and o dunno why this is being shown. A Big No to all fellow travellers.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I wish there was a negative rating which could be given. The rooms are bad. The facility is bad. Not maintained. Washroom does not have shower. Towels are dirty. Breakfast options are very limited. Negligible staff is rude. We had tea in the room. They did not remove the cup for three days. The room was dirty. When we asked for a change. They said either check out or pay extra for a room change. There was no Bell boy, no staff nothing I had to carry my luggage myself to and fro breakfast, only have beef and pork. There’s nothing for vegetarian five minutes late beyond the timings of breakfast, and the breakfast is done. You will not be served, not recommended if you’re travelling with family, not recommended at all.

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.text: In all our travels and we been traveling in Asia for the last 4 years we have never stayed in such a horrible hotel 😱Don’t be fooled by pictures ( probably 20 years old) the hotel is nothing like that. First impressions when you come up to lobby the glass doors were sooo dirty, it probably haven’t been cleaned for years. Room was cleanish, had a kettle but no coffee or tea. There was no safe so we asked to but our money passports at the reception, but they had no safe too so just putted in a cupboard. Half an hour later we popped round to reception and nobody was there. Anyone could have gone behind the desk and took the stuff. The pool area was very outdated. The plaster pealing off the walls… you get the picture. Breakfast was horrible, Mostly curries ( hardly warm) toaster was broken… We was ment to stay 7 days, we managed one night. The next day we cut our losses, packed our bags and left without looking back. I wish Agoda would take it of their site

reviews.title: Dangerous. Someone will die here
reviews.text: It’s absolutely dreadful, it’s dangerous and we saw a major incident on the 1st day when a deck chair collapsed causing serious back injury. On arrival late at night we were told of a room upgrade, when we awoke in the morning we found the room had a floor to ceiling window which could be opened wide with no safety barriers, 4th floor . We mentioned to manager who told us that a family with kids had booked that room , but manager felt it was unsafe for children , so they gave them our room and put us in the unsafe room . The public areas in the hotel are crumbling to bits , pool area looks great on first site but has serious safety issue including a 6ft open drop at the end of the sunbed terrace and major sharp broken tiles and rusty objects.  Room is of very poor decor  and is very dated . Please do not book here , if already booked , cancel if possible. We left 2 days early with a promise from management that we’d be refunded the 2 days .  I cannot post pictures but this is the worst place I have ever stayed . Bird droppings on dining table , table cloths are filthy, cleaning standards are below poor but that was the least of the issues . It’s terrible

reviews.title: Stay at your own risk Room 205
reviews.text: DO NOT be deceived by the pictures in Agoda or those that I attached. We paid more to have a sea view room, only to discover balcony door could not be locked when we checked in, hotel staff fixed it n informed us now that the door is repaired, not to open it. Excuse me pay for sea view but cannot open door to balcony? Next the shower hose is a joke, the water flow is so slow that that I can’t even manage to wash my hair n the floor floods whenever I shower. The water is not hot so you need to do a cold shower. Pillow is smelly, smell of sweat till we requested for another one. Breakfast is horrible with flies flying over the sauces which are not covered. You need to tell the staff to top up whatever food that is finished, they don’t seem to care. Paid for 5N for 3rooms and I checked out on the 3rd day to a better hotel… this hotel is a complete nightmare

Fourthy  years ago this would have been a high class elegant hotel but obviously this hotel has  been neglected for very long time  first impression when we arrived there must have been a tsunami in the last 12 months to cause this beautiful facility with wonderful ambiance be in need of a good cleaning on the exterior, patio tiles broken , buckled and very difficult to navigate  , very much in need of sever makeover .sorry but I cannot say anything positive about our week long stay in Sun Viet Resort ,would definitely not recommend staying there

reviews.title: Sun Viet Hotel
reviews.text: Agoda booking site really ripped us off with this hotel. We paid $88aud through Agoda. We could have paid $52aud if we had booked through the hotels website. Other hotel booking sites offered better prices than Agoda. I found this out later. The Agoda website constantly said “hurry, last room available “. Which was not the case. It’s a marketing ploy to make you think it’s a popular hotel. Anyway, I’m very disappointed with the hotel. It wasn’t worth the money we paid. It’s worth $24aud per night. It’s low budget accommodation. The photos on the website must have been taken when the hotel was brand new. It doesn’t look or feel anything like that now. The only positive is its location to the centre of town.

reviews.title: Over Priced Accommodation
reviews.text:
I was looking forward to my stay here but was extremely disappointed.  The highlight of the property is their pool area, but that's about it.  The staff aren't the friendliest and the breakfast is mediocre.  

I was meant to stay for 3 nights but checked out after my first night. 

1. Bed comfort level is verylow

2. Toilet requires guest to hold the button down until flush is complete

3. When taking a shower, water leaks all over basically flooding the bathroom floor

4. Poor door design.  Has a large frosted window at the top allowing hallway light in, making it difficult to sleep

5. Very little hot water

6. Had no water from between 2-3am and they weren't expecting it to be back on until around 2pm.  Which means no water access for between 10-12 hours

A fresh coat of paint in a few areas would also go a long way in brightening the property and making it feel more cared for.

reviews.title: Okay-ish, needs full renovation
reviews.text:
We were assigned a sea facing room, they “upgraded” us because we stayed for a few nights. After the first night the bed was so bad we had to request changing rooms. The staff of the hotel was 5*, they changed us to a room facing the road because they didn’t have any other available but it didn’t matter for us, we just wanted a decent bed. In this new room the beds were much better, you get noise all night from the road but nothing too much if you’re not a light sleeper. Again, the hotel staff is really great, but the facilities need a major renovation, from the pool to the rooms and top to bottom. Breakfast is okay-ish. The best thing about it is the location, you have plenty of things around the hotel and parking is free if you have a bike. Beach is nearby, but not quite at the hotel doorstep. 
For the price, it’s acceptable.

You can think of the shower as not having hot water. It's perfect for those who love the good old days ✌ It was a bit like a small art museum!

The staff are all very nice ♥ There's no beach directly in front of the hotel, but it's right next door. The sunset is beautiful! Breakfast is half buffet style, with a main dish ordered.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
I stayed at Sun Viet Resort in Phu Quoc and overall had a good experience.

The biggest advantage of this resort is its location — everything like the market, Indian food options, spa, and convenience stores are within walking distance, which makes it very convenient. The swimming pool is excellent and offers a beautiful sea view, making it a highlight of the stay.

The breakfast was very good with a decent variety. However, the property looks a bit old and could benefit from some maintenance, as certain areas (like wall paint) were worn out. In our room, the AC stopped working, but the staff did change our room after we reported it.

In terms of service, the male staff members were helpful and polite, but there is room for improvement in the behaviour and responsiveness of some female staff.

Overall, this is a very good property with great location and facilities. With some renovation and better service consistency, it can become an excellent stay option.

The room was huge and bed was perfect!  The shower in the otherhand was less than desirable... option was only to sit to take a bath style shower. Again, child friendly, but not adult friendly facility. 

We enjoyed our stay overall! We would return to thos property, but probably ask for a different room with a better shower arrangement!

reviews.text: Even though everything was clean and tidy I feel the hotel could do with a major update due to many things inside are old and out. When you shower the water floods the bathroom as the door has no stoppers on it the powerpoint pushed into the wall, not enough pillows for 2 people. The breakfast was good enough I've had better though. The pool area is amazing yet could do with an update as well. The staff are super friendly which made up for it all. My seaview was spectacular.

reviews.title: Great budget hotel
reviews.text: Old but overall good condition hotel. Right beside beach. Great heated swimming pool. OK/  to good breakfast with egg station. Deluxe room was large with balcony. Cleaner was hit and miss. I was 5* on the beach in Nah Trang before here for the same price which was £23 per night b&b, so didn't feel like a bargain at all. Staff were excellent and lovely. I'm now just down from the airport in a much better 4-5* hotel for £33 per night with breakfast... well worth the extra £10!!!

reviews.title: Enjoy and relax at Sun Viet.
reviews.text: Choosing a room with a sea-view balcony is truly wonderful! The entire ocean space is filled with sunshine during the day and sparkles mysteriously at night right before your eyes! The sound of the waves is gently flowing beneath you as you stroll along the spacious path under the shade of the palm trees behind the hotel. It's a fantastic landscape for you to relax, just wanting to lie down on the long chair or hammock for a good nap! The Phu Quoc night market is overflowing with fresh seafood, fruits, cakes, and snacks just nearby, only a 3-5 minute walk away. Overall, it's very convenient, so despite the room being a bit old, it still feels quite okay.

The accommodation is very spacious, there are plenty of places to eat nearby, and you can also walk to the night market. The cleanliness status is at 80%. Please consider this, and if the price is acceptable to you, it's so-so.

reviews.title: Great place with a few issues!
reviews.text: The staff were fantastic as was the breakfast and pool . The main issue I had was with the shower I had in my first room. A number of times there was no hot water. They fixed it once and it happened again. Also that shower had no door. The second room  I had was better. The location is great for exploring that part of the coast with great restaurants all over the place.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: The price is reasonable. The room condition is quite good, but the locking mechanism on the door leading to the balcony is a bit flimsy because it's old, and the shower booth does not drain well. When I turned on the water at the sink, it flowed onto the floor, but they fixed it immediately when I mentioned it. The swimming pool is okay, but it has leaves floating in it, and it's disappointing that the exterior is not well maintained.

reviews.title: Best value for money. Great breakfast place^^
reviews.text: The staff are neither kind nor unkind, just average. The breakfast is really delicious!! If you go late, there won't be any left~ Go early and try the pho, it's the best! I've never seen any Koreans here. It feels like a resort for locals. The pool is deep and the water is a bit cloudy, but~~ It's right in front of the bus stop for VinBus, so the location is fantastic. You can also walk to Dong Xuan Market. I would definitely revisit this place^^. There were no bugs~

reviews.title: Great location, the hotel is right in front of bus stops 17 and 19, and it only takes a 10-minute walk to the night market.
reviews.text: The location is good, right in front of the hotel are bus stops 17 and 19, and it only takes a 10-minute walk to the night market. Choosing a sea view room is better; city view rooms facing the road may have some noise (but it's acceptable). Overall, the hotel is a bit old but clean enough. The staff are friendly, especially the restaurant staff who are attentive when making eggs and noodle soup. The pool is deep enough, and there are standing boards, with photo spots by the sea. The air conditioning is sufficient, and the bathroom water is hot enough, but the drainage needs improvement, although it doesn't overflow outside.

reviews.title: Good Valued Hotel
reviews.text:
Location: Great location. There's a bus stop (vinbus) nearby, so you can easily explore most places. It's a 10-minute walk to reach Phu Quoc Night Market.

Facilities: They have nice decorations in the pool area; you can overlook the sea and sunset, so you can either just chill there or take tons of beautiful photos.

Food: Their breakfast was good, with various food items provided (but not too many choices for vegetarians) and it tasted good.

Room: It would be great if the shower water could be adjusted. It's lukewarm only, so I felt cold when I took a shower in the evening after returning. Also, some of the rooms use a key, which may be difficult for some of us to manage (it's hard to open the door when you come back).

Service: The quality of the front desk staff wasn’t consistent. Some staff were not willing to listen and assist guests. However, some provided good service and assistance. I highly appreciated Ms. Tran (I’m not sure if I’m spelling it correctly, but she’s the petite lady with a warm heart who is helpful). She made my stay in Phu Quoc more comfortable and easy since it was my first time here. I also witnessed (I arrived early on the check-in date) how she treated each guest with good service.

I would say it’s a Good Value Hotel. I loved my stay there and hope to return one day!

reviews.title: Great location and great staff

The hotel is right by the beach., however,  you do have to walk about 100 meters to go to the nice swimming area.  The pool area can be quite romantic to hang out for sunset viewing or chilling at night. I asked for a ocean view room and for the price,  I think it was decent value. Clean,  decent amenities and AC worked well.   My favorite part about the hotel is the reception staff.  Very warm, helpful  and accommodating.

reviews.text: The high ceilings speak of a charm that has been long forgotten in the modern world. The hotel has an elegance about like you're stepping into the most beautiful hotel on the island several decades ago. It's holding together well. For those who appreciate architecture, a fine swimming pool and beachfront sunset views. Breakfast has a solid variety and is value for money. Staff are helpful and friendly. Between a 3 star and 4 stars, but the architecture is close to 5 stars for those who appreciate building design. Only slight negative is shower was lukewarm but the whole experience makes this very easy to overlook.

Bể bơi rộng, view từ quầy bar xuống đẹp. Khoảng sân nối biển và bể bơi cũng rộng rãi, có vài chiếc võng

It's convenient to go to the night market, and there are many local shops around, so I'm very satisfied overall. The only downside is that the refrigerator was a bit weak, perhaps because it's old. reviews.title: Good for the price.
reviews.text: My family had a 5-day, 4-night vacation in Phu Quoc, and each night we stayed at a different hotel. We found Sun Viet to be a good option within our budget. Breakfast was decent, the rooms were spacious, and the amenities met our basic needs. I particularly liked the room design and the wide, airy pathways. The downside is that the beach is not suitable for swimming, but the view for watching the sunset is really nice.

reviews.title: Great location and delicious breakfast at a reasonable price, friendly service.
reviews.text: I went there without any expectations because the prices were quite low, but it was so different from what I thought – thumbs up!! First of all, the location is great. The night market is within walking distance, and being right in front of the free shuttle bus stop is fantastic. I was able to take the free shuttle bus to Grand World safely and comfortably on a hot day. It also goes to the airport, which saved me money on transportation. I saw that it operates only until April 30 and that another company would take over in May, but we really took advantage of it at the end of April. Moreover, the breakfast at the restaurant was surprisingly good for the price; fresh watermelon, which seemed to have just come out of sugar, and chewy mango were available, along with all the ingredients needed to make banh mi. Additionally, you can choose 3 different meal options every day, which will be carefully cooked and served at your table with friendly service! The combination of price, location, and friendliness is truly the best. Plus, photos turn out surprisingly beautiful! Oh, and when you leave the resort and head left towards the night market, there’s a bakery just a few meters away that you must visit!! Inside, there are incredibly beautiful backgrounds waiting, and I captured some great life photos there!!

I forgot to bring my key, and the cleaning staff came to help within two minutes; I really felt embarrassed as it was already past eight o'clock in the evening.

reviews.text: Oui pour le tarif payé et le personnel en place (qui se relayait en ce jour de TET) mais il s agit bien d un hôtel dont les propriétaires ne se soucient plus, comme beaucoup en Asie du sud-est : peintures défraîchies, ampoules non fonctionnelles, traces de rouille, rideaux voilages en lambeaux (chambre 110) et serviettes de bain qui s effilochent...

reviews.title: Hôtel correct - bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.text: Bon petit déjeuner. Belle grande piscine mais pas de plage. Il faut aller à la plage de l'hôtel Saigon Phuquoc avec des rochers. Ménage de la chambre limité au strict minimum : lavabo et toilettes non nettoyés !!! Draps non changés pour 6 nuits ! Le personnel est adorable et disponible.

reviews.title: Bon hôtel
reviews.text:
Excellent rapport qualité prix.
Hôtel un peu ancien mais confortable.
Bon buffet pour le petit déjeuner.
Belle piscine.
Belle vue sur la mer

reviews.title: Points positifs et negatifs
reviews.text: Très belle piscine à proximité de la mer personnel aux petits soins près des bus gratuit pour accéder au parc très grande chambres

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.text: Le personnel est très pro et gentil. L’hotel est très propre. Le petit dej est varié. Ils louent les scooters, ce qui est très pratique.

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.text:
Personnel très accueillant et gentil. Une belle piscine. Bon petit déjeuner. 
Pas loin de night market. Au front de mer.
Dommage hôtel est mal entretenu, le côté ville est bruyant. Pas de plage.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Magnifique hôtel vue sur la mer paradisiaque pas loin du marché nocturne à 10minutes à pied

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: RAS très bel hôtel bien placé

reviews.title: Top
reviews.text: Au top et très beau coucher de soleil ☀️

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text:
Beautiful beach front hotel. Located at the center of Phu Quoc. Easy acces to central market, shops,restaurants, bars are within walking distance. Extremely clean & comfortable . Upon arrival we were warmly welcomed by the friendly reception staff.
The room was really comfortable and the breakfast was great with a good choice of hot and cold food, and fresh fruit. Tea, coffee
 and juice were also available.
Nice swimming pool. 
Watching sunset is a must thing to do here.
I have a super view from my room ocean panorama! 
Highly recommended!👍🏻😊

reviews.title: Schlechtester Aufenthalt in Vietnam
reviews.text:
Das Hotel ist runtergerockt und man merkt dass nur noch der letzte Rest ausgemolken wird. Mein "Deluxe Seview" war leider komplett von Palmen versperrt, das Zimmer ist lieblos und alt. WLAN/WiFi bricht immer wieder ab. Ich habe mich nicht wohl gefühlt. Der naheliegende Strand ist schmal und dreckig, sodass man selbst bei sonnigem Wetter keine Lust hat rein zu gehen. Das Frühstück ist unterirdisch.

Zum Glück hatte ich nur 2 Nächte gebucht...

reviews.title: Hygiene total vernachlässigt
reviews.text:
Zimmer werden in 2 Minuten gereinigt. Die ganze Hotelanlage ist baufällig. Insbesondere die Hygiene im gesamten Haus lässt scher zu wünschen übrig. Spricht man das Management darauf an wird sich nicht gekümmert , oder das Management ist plötzlich über Tage abwesend, niemand fühlt sich zuständig. Absolut nicht zu empfehlen. Habe mir durch den verunreinigten Pool , oder Pooldusche einen Hautausschlag eingefangen. Als ich die Rezeption um Hilfe bat , wurde mir lediglich eine Salbe besorgt . Einen Poolreiniger habe ich in einer Woche Aufenthalt nicht einmal zu Gesicht bekommen. Auf den Toiletten und Duschen am Pool , keine Seife keine Trockentücher, einfach nichts vorhaben. Selbst im Empfangsbereich , Lobby, auf den WCs ebenfalls. Habe alles per Kamera 📷 auf Bildern festgehalten. Mit dem Agoda Team Kontakt aufgenommen, es wurde quasi nicht auf das Problem eingegangen. Zudem werde ich eine Rezession bei Google mit anhängigen Bildern einstellen. Es wurde mir keine angemessene Erstattung zukommen gelassen.
Mit freundlichen Grüßen

reviews.title: Schimmel und Modergeruch in den Zimmern
reviews.text:
Wir sind 30 Minuten nach dem Check in direkt wieder abgereist. Das Hotel scheint heruntergewirtschaftet zu werden. Grund unserer Abreise war offensichtlicher Schimmel in den Zimmern und damit einhergehender Modergeruch. Gefahr für die Gesundheit...

Ganz klar keine Empfehlung.

reviews.title: Kein Gegenwert fürs Geld
reviews.text: Die besten Jahre der Einrichtung sind schon sehr lange vorbei. Sehr geringer Wasserdruck in der Kaltwasserleitung. Hinweis dazu hat nichts gebracht. Bitte zum Zimmerwechsel wurde ignoriert, obwohl ich 9 Nächte gebucht hatte. Zerrissenes Bettzeug mit zu kleinen Maßen. Einziges Highlight waren die Angestellten im Restaurant, die freundlich und zuvorkommend waren.

reviews.title: Nicht zu empfehlen, ekelig
reviews.text:
Wo soll ich anfangen. Zuerst einmal, ich bin jemand, der sich mit wenigen zufrieden gibt. Und ich schreibe nie negative Bewertungen, sondern entweder positiv oder neutral. Dieses Hotel kann ich aber nichtmal neutral bewerten. Es war kein schöner Aufenthalt. Wir haben zu dritt 2 Zimmer gebucht. Das einzig positive war, dass wir ein Zimmer mit Meerblick und eins zur Straße bekommen haben, weil das Hotel voll war, obwohl wir 2 Zimmer zur Straße gebucht haben. 
In der Beschreibung steht: schalldichte Fenster. Es sind ganz normale einfach verglaste Fenster, wie überall auch, NICHT schalldicht zur Straße hin. Also nur Schlafen mit Oropax möglich. Zum Meer hin das Zimmer war ruhig. 
Als wir uns das Bett angeschaut haben, kam der erste Ekel. Die Kissenbezüge rochen nicht frisch sondern benutzt von einer Person. Auch die Decke hatte einen ganz ekeligen Geruch. Zudem waren überall verschieden farbige Flecken auf dem Laken. Wir sind zur Rezeption und haben ganz nett nach neuen Bezügen gefragt. Hier wurde gesagt, dass nach 9pm leider kein Zugang zum Wäschelager mehr möglich wäre. Also haben wir uns vom anderen gebuchten Zimmer 2 Kissen und das Laken genommen. Die Person an der Rezeption meinte es würde aufgeschrieben und am nächsten Tag gemacht werden. 
Am nächsten Tag waren wir unterwegs und kamen abends wieder. Gleiche Wäsche, nur Bett schön gemacht. Und jetzt lagen da die 2 Kissen, die wir weggelegt haben und die 2 aus dem anderen Zimmer. Und das alte Bettlaken (das neue, das wir aus dem Nachbarzimmer hatten war weg). Wir also wieder zur Rezeption. Dort saß eine Frau. Es wurde ganz lieb gefragt, ob sie Englisch könne ( da die Tage zuvor der Google Übersetzer nötig war).  Hier kam nur ein komischer Ton und ein arrogantes Gesicht, was schwer viel zu deuten. Aber es sollte wohl heißen, sie könne englisch. Also wurde ganz höflich unsererseits einfach nur nach neuen Bezügen gefragt, wir würden auch selber beziehen. Darauf nur die prompte Antwort im Befehlston: „Go into your room“. Wir dachten das wäre ausversehen also fragten wir nochmal, und sie wiederholte die gleiche Antwort. Kurze Zeit später kam eine Reinigungsdame und reichte mir ein Bettlaken. Dieses sah leider nicht viel besser aus. Keine neue Betwäsche.  Wir waren es leid nochmal nachzufragen.
Im Bad war noch das Duschzeug vom Vorgänger. Die Dusche schließt nicht mehr und ist vergilbt. Siehe Bilder. Das Bad steht deshalb nach dem Duschen unter Wasser. 
Sauber war es auch nicht wirklich. Wir haben gesehen, dass die benutzten Handtücher von dem Reinigungspersonal zum putzen verwendet wurden für Amatouren und alles mögliche. Das erklärt warum selbst die sauberen Handtücher so aussehen wie sie aussehen. 
Die Eingangstüren zu den Zimmern haben alle oben ein Fenster (siehe Bild). Da nachts auf dem Flur alles hell erleuchtet ist, sind  auch die Zimmer dadurch hell. 
Jetzt zum Frühstück: 
Alle Tischdecken sind schmutzig und klebrig mit Gravuren drin, die garnicht mehr sauber gemacht werden können. Von der Auswahl gab es ein paar Sachen. Es war okay zum Essen, nur wie gesagt alles sehr unhygienisch. 
Das Hotel ist absolut in die Jahre gekommen, überall bröckelt Farbe ab an den Wänden. Sowohl außen als auch in den Räumen. 
Wer bis hier hin gelesen hat, ***.

reviews.title: Unter dem durchschnitt
reviews.text: Die Ausstattung des Hotels war schlecht. Die Reinigung war auch schlecht das Bad Grauenhaft. Das einzige Gute war das Schwimmbad, der Strand ist nicht benutzbar, sowie das Meer-Wasser war immer schlecht. Das Frühstück. War im Europäischen Vergleich sehr mangelhaft.

reviews.title: Ganz ok.
reviews.text:
Ein in die Jahre gekommenes Hotel in sehr guter Lage. Freundliche Rezeptionistin / Tram, sehr hilfsbereit und kompetent. Frühstücksbuffet ok. 
Pools sauber, sind teilweise tief. 
Gerne wieder

reviews.title: Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt
reviews.text: Da wir im Dachgeschoss gewohnt haben, hatten wir ein schönes Zimmer, das Frühstücksbuffet war abwechslungsreich und einen schönen Frühstücksraum. Das Frühstück Personal war sehr aufmerksam.

reviews.title: Schönes Foto!
reviews.text:
Damit es so aussieht muss schon viel zusammenkommen. Guter Fotograf!
Ansonsten ganz in Ordnung,alles sauber und das Personal ist bemüht.
Super Frühstück für den Preis,der Pool ist auch schön und sauber und meistens recht ruhig,nur im Meer baden ging dort nicht,alles Beton und der Strand weggespühlt,was aber in Taifungebieten nicht ungewöhnlich ist.
Genügend Einskaufsmöglichkeiten,Wäschereien und Restaurants ringsum un der Hafen mit den sensationellen Fischrestaurants und dem Nachtmarkt zu Fuß in 10 min.zu erreichen,alles andere ist mit dem kostenfreien!Bus möglich.
Also alles in allem schwer in Ordnung für den Preis.

reviews.title: In die Jahre gekommen
reviews.text: Das Hotel ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen und hat leider nicht mehr die Gästeanzahl, die es braucht. Es sind ein paar Bereiche ganz leer und mit großen Vorhängen zu gehangen, was dem Aussehen ein wenig schadet. Aber das Personal ist nett, auch wenn nicht alle Englisch verstehen. Das Frühstück ist vielfältig und alles dabei was man so braucht.

reviews.title: Gutes Mittelklassehotel
reviews.text:
Zentral gelegenes Hotel. Personal sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Schöne Aussicht auf's Meer ( seview room ). Pool sauber. Frühstück sehr gut.
Kostenloser Shuttlebus vom Flughafen hält direkt vor dem Hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything is good, except the room is old. The window and floor should be repaired.

reviews.title: potrebbe essere meglio
reviews.text:
Un hotel fronte mare, con giardino, ma senza spiaggia, con mare non praticabile.
Per questo ha una grande piscina, peccato che sia scivolosa.
E' una struttura che ha vissuto tempi migliori, ma ora necessita di manutenzione.
Diciamo che il prezzo della camera tiene conto delle magagne del bagno e del servizio che è fatto di malavoglia, con ogni giorno una dimenticanza: vuoi un tappeto, vuoi le bottiglie di acqua, vuoi il caffè. Mentre lo scarico della doccia esonda ...
Lo fai notare al personale che fa la camera ... che non fa niente.
Il personale della reception, invece, è molto disponibile e servizievole. 
La colazione inclusa è buona, con una varietà di scelta a buffet, ed il servizio cottura delle omelette a piacere.
Il wifi è scadente, lento e con frequenti interruzioni.

reviews.title: Rimane una buona scelta
reviews.text: Personale alla reception molto gentile e disponibile, ( la signora Toiy e il giovane Mardi sono eccezionali). Camere grandi, letti confortevoli , stile retro' . Colazione buona con scelta, soprattutto per asiatici. Pulizia.....si può fare di più. Piscina molto grande ma purtroppo non c'è adeguato controllo. Bisognerebbe educare i locali a farsi una doccia dopo la spiaggia prima di entrare in piscina, perché si riempie di sabbia e questo non è un bene né per la piscina, né per l'hotel, né per gli altri ospiti. E infine non è possibile vedere persone, non clienti, usufruire della piscina e del resto....Non è una sicurezza vedere estranei entrare e uscire dalla piscina come se fosse pubblica.  Per il resto ci vorrebbe una bella manutenzione per mantenere l'hotel in buone condizioni. È la terza volta che vengo qui e la qualità è scesa , soprattutto per la clientela. Come posizione rimane la migliore e le camere fronte mare offrono dei tramonti ineguagliabili.Auguri.

reviews.title: Buon soggiorno
reviews.text: Struttura datata, camera grande e letto gigantesco... Materasso comodo e colazione buona... Pulizia potrebbe essere meglio. Unica nota dolente è che ci vorrebbe una sorveglianza in piscina.... praticamente entra chi vuole e questo non è una sicurezza per nessuno.

reviews.title: Sempre qui quando vengo a Phu Quoc
reviews.text: Personale alla reception molto gentili , pulizia buona , colazione ottima, camere grandi e letti comodi.Un po' trascurata la piscina.Hotel datato ma di buona qualità, posizione perfetta.

reviews.title: Sempre qui a Phu Quoc
reviews.text: Hotel datato con tutti i pregi degli hotel di un'altra epoca : camere grandi , letti comodi e grandissimi, posizione davanti al mare , colazione buona, pulizia buona e reception affidabile. Piscina davvero grande e pulita. Grazie.

reviews.title: Perfetta soluzione a Phu Quoc
reviews.text: Camera spaziosa e pulita, personale gentile, letto gigantesco, colazione buona , posizione vicina a night market e a 50 metri dalla spiaggia.Piscina grande.Tutto un po' vintage, ma tenuto bene.

reviews.title: Beetje vergane glorie
reviews.text: Er is niets meer vernieuwd of gedaan in dit hotel. Klein beetje vergane glorie. Jammer. Verder was onze kamer met zeezicht met een schimmelgeur. We kregen meteen een upgrade maar dat was zonder balkon. We hebben een andere kamer gekregen aan de stads kant en kregen binnen een half uur de compensatie uitbetaald via Agoda. Zeer netjes geregeld. Personeel was uiterst vriendelijk. Ontbijt was ook goed en zeer uitgebreid.

reviews.title: Christmas and New Year vacations
reviews.text: Muito bem localizado, em frente á praia, perto do mercado noturno, empregados sempre atenciosos, bom pequeno almoço.  Excelente

reviews.title: トリッキーなホテル
reviews.text:
海辺のリゾート、街のナイトマーケットも歩行圏内、料金等からこのホテルを選んだ。部屋はケチな私が選んだシティ―ビューでは無く、シービュー（グレードアップ）。但しトイレの床は排水管が詰まっているのか、常時水びたし！
予定どうり2泊したが、問題はチェックアウト時に起った。　受付の若い女性が早口のベトナムイングリッシュで「部屋の水のボトルは何本使いましたか？」・・・また、水の入ったボトル2本を見せて「これを使いませんでしたか？」・・・直ぐには状況が掴めなかったが、要するに、無料の水ボトルでは無く有料のボトルを使ったのではないか？と詰問されていると判断。
年は取っても、ラベルの色もボトルのサイズも明らかに違う両者を取り違えることなど絶対に無い！
受付の女性が最後に言ったのは「貴方のサインは無くても請求額にチャージしておきます！」。
不快の極み、こんな経験は最初で最後！？

reviews.title: ガッカリ
reviews.text: オーシャンビューの部屋に泊まりました。建物が古く雰囲気が暗いです。中心街からも微妙に離れ不便です。価格は安いですが、値段相応で、あまりお勧めしません。

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text:
Good location, close to the Night Market.
Equipments of hotel is so so…

reviews.title: シャワーのお湯
reviews.text: シャワーのお湯が低すぎ。体温より低いかも。暖かいシャワーを浴びたい場合はお勧めできません。

reviews.title: 冷水シャワー
reviews.text:
結構高い金額を払ったが、シャワーが水でお湯が出なかった。ボディソープもシャンプーも質が悪い、ご飯は美味しくない。最悪でした。
ホテル横のプールから見える夕日は綺麗です。

reviews.title: まぁいいかな
reviews.text:
上の階の音がうるさい。シャワーのお湯がぬるい。隣の敷地から午前2時くらいまで音楽が聞こえる。
修復が必要なところは多いですが、許容範囲内です。
Wi-Fi、朝食、リネンは問題なし。

reviews.title: アクティブ派にはいいかも
reviews.text:
ナイトマーケットには徒歩でいけます。
周りにも少し歩くとお店もあるので、食事には困らないいいロケーションです。

ホテルは古いので、設備的には少し問題があるように思います。
こちらのホテルで個人的にドライバーさんを手配していただいたのですが、その方は大変親切で、サービス精神があるので、本当に良かったです。

朝食も質素ですが、食べれるので、アクティブに出歩く人にはいいと思います。
ホテルのスタッフさんも親切そうな人でした。

reviews.title: コスパ的にはよい
reviews.text: フーコック全体だが、無駄にホテルなど価格が高いが、ここはまとも。一応、直結のビーチ、プールもある。ナイトマーケットにも徒歩圏内。

reviews.title: 改善が必要
reviews.text: 無料バスの乗り場近く、島内移動は便利です。朝食も普通です。但し、敷地内はどこも、汚いままです。ゴミ？のような物が至る所に見られます。次回も利用したいと思っているので、頑張って欲しいと思います。

reviews.title: 素敵なホテル
reviews.text: スタッフさんが親切に笑顔で対応してくれます！施設は古いですが、掃除もされてて清潔！立地も良かったです

reviews.title: 立地最高
reviews.text:
最高に便利な立地
朝食は少し物足りない。
その他は良し。

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: ห้องพักใหญ่มาก ไม่ไกลจากNight market เงียบสงบดีแต่หน้าโรงแรมไม่มีชายหาดให้ลงเล่นน้ำ ต้องเดินออกไปนิดหน่อย ภาพรวมก็เหมาะสม

reviews.title: ที่พักดี
reviews.text: ดีทุกอย่างไม่ติดชายหาดด้านหน้า แต่เดินไปเองได้

reviews.title: 不推薦
reviews.text: 這是我訂過最差的住宿, 完全不推薦.  我們訂了一個3人房, 再付款加床, 他們安排了一個4人房間, 非常之大, 但是, 殘破不堪.  完成找不到在網上訂的三人房間是光猛.   殘破到不可以叫做RESORT, 只有一點好, 位置方便, 但是, 附近前後也有不同RESORT . 1) 非常殘破不堪 2) 服務態度不友善 3) 洗手間一個長方型, 完全沒有分隔, 所有水浸在裡面, 很易滑倒 4) 房間黑暗 5) 衣櫃殘破, 完成開不到 6) 空間用大量的香劑除去污濁和塵垢.  雖然是旺季, 這環境和質素與價格是完成不能接受.  非常後悔!

reviews.title: 平平無奇
reviews.text: 位置好環境好 設施極差 企缸水流出廁所門口 要求處理 第一次態度可以 第二次 態度惡劣 不敢再麻煩他 服務處只有一位年輕男性 態度好好 值得嘉許 還有 晚上見到一隻大曱甴 雖然環境超好 但多數不會考慮下一次

reviews.title: 外荒漂亮，内在欠佳...不會再入住也不會推薦！
reviews.text: 除了在沙灘看日落及位置較佳之外，實在没有可叫好之處......一間甚殘舊的過氣老餅酒店。設施差，房間係大，但空空蕩蕩僅摆幾件既殘又舊的木制家具，完全沒有熱水，换了房也如是！其中一两個職員服務尚不錯，但不諳英語難溝通。總而言之，大把其他好得多的酒店可選擇！

reviews.title: 很舊的酒店
reviews.text: 好處是地點方便，其他沒什麼值得推介，泳池水很髒，設施殘舊，服務一般

reviews.title: problem with hot shower at room
reviews.text: Caution for the traveler willing to have hot shower after the day, very little hot water for shower. Nice sea view, reasonable breakfast and 10 minutes walk to the night market.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: good

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 酒店設施太舊，早餐一般，不過以性價比 200蚊以下一晚係抵住嘅！

reviews.title: 按摩 桑拿 夜市 齊全
reviews.text: 向左走 200米 有士多 再加100米 按摩 咖啡店 再加50米 夜市 向右走 1000米 包羅萬有中型餐廳

reviews.title: 近富國夜市
reviews.text: 近大馬路旁，17號免費穿梭巴士就在門口，去大世界和機場方便，有靜泳池黃昏看日落，可惜沒有沙灘連接及不夠熱，有時是長冷水沒熱水。

reviews.title: 地方好，價錢平
reviews.text: 員工服務好，泳池不錯，海景不錯

reviews.title: 浴室問題
reviews.text: 控制熱水比較困難

reviews.title: 價錢平，位置好，無敵海景，靚泳池
reviews.text: 夜間需要有熱水
